calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Leticia Perez.
David Mendez, Esq., for Plaintiff Navnit Patel.
Defendants: Richard Mayo and Kim Lamont present in pro per.
Parties met and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the settlement are listed on a 3 pg. Judgment pursuant to stipulation filed in court today.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
